provenance: Synthetic, generated deterministically (not a live capture): D8 describes capturing a real corrupted Claude Code PTY session via creack/pty, but a live capture is not reproducible in CI, so this fixture replays the byte patterns that corrupted the x/vt backend — truecolor lines scrolling off-screen (color was lost in scrollback), Ink-style cursor-up/erase-below redraw frames with stray CRs, an 80-column line rewritten via CR from the right border (border corruption), and embedded DA1/DSR/XTVERSION device queries.
replay: fed in 257-byte chunks (prime stride) so escape sequences and multi-byte UTF-8 runes split across chunk boundaries

sections.name: A-colored-scroll
sections.intent: 41 colored lines; 40-row body scrolls past a 24-row screen so scrollback retains SGR content; every 8th line carries wide CJK + braille for width accounting

sections.name: B-device-queries
sections.intent: DA1 + DSR(6n) + XTVERSION; responses must reach the PTY via the WRITE_PTY callback

sections.name: C-ink-redraw-churn
sections.intent: cursor-up + erase-below spinner frames inside synchronized-update brackets, stray CRs, and an 80-col line rewritten via CR from the right border

sections.name: D-final-screen
sections.intent: colored box + prompt with no trailing newline; the golden pins this screen
